description_long: This object is a round, green cactus with a dense covering of evenly spaced, pale yellow areoles, each sprouting fine, short spines. The cactus is planted in a faceted, brown, polygonal pot that appears to be made of terracotta or a similar material. The pot is simple and unadorned, with a wide rim and a slightly tapered body. The cactus itself is globular, with a healthy, vibrant green color and a symmetrical arrangement of its areoles. The spines are thin and radiate outward from each areole, giving the plant a slightly fuzzy appearance. The overall look is clean and well-maintained, suitable for decorative use in urban environments.
description: A round green cactus with pale yellow spines sits in a faceted brown terracotta pot. The plant is healthy and symmetrical, with a simple, unadorned container.
description_view_0: The cactus is centered in the brown faceted pot, showing a clear view of the symmetrical areole pattern and spines.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the right side of the cactus, revealing more of the pot's faceted edges and the dense arrangement of areoles.
description_view_2: The cactus appears slightly rotated, with the left side of the pot more visible and the areole pattern consistent across the surface.
description_view_3: A similar view to the previous, but with the cactus rotated further, showing the back side and maintaining the uniformity of the spines and pot.
